description.text: The location: A gorgeous bedroom, in the most wonderful modern home on the foot of the lush green hills in a town, close to Zurich.

The concept: a popular one: a stunning background colour of choice and then I go for it and paint all your favourite trees, birds and plants into the room in a composition and colour scheme that really works for the space. It has a chinoiserie feel to it. I love to do this style and the room ends up looking cosy, warm, elevated and lovely. Positive vibes all round.
